scripts.dev: tsx scripts/codegen-router.ts --watch & [ -f scripts/codegen-db.ts ] && tsx scripts/codegen-db.ts --watch & NODE_ENV=development APP_ENV=development tsx watch --clear-screen=false --env-file=.env src/app.ts
scripts.codegen: tsx scripts/codegen-router.ts && ([ -f scripts/codegen-db.ts ] && tsx scripts/codegen-db.ts || true) && eslint --fix src/router.ts src/db.ts && prettier --write src/router.ts src/db.ts
scripts.admin:set: sh -c '[ -f src/admin-set.ts ] && NODE_ENV=development APP_ENV=development tsx --env-file=.env src/admin-set.ts "$@" || echo Install postgres plugin first' --
scripts.migrate: [ -f drizzle.config.ts ] && NODE_ENV=development APP_ENV=development tsx --env-file=.env -e 'import {migrate} from "drizzle-orm/postgres-js/migrator"; import {rawDb as db} from "./src/db"; await migrate(db, {migrationsFolder: "./drizzle"}); process.exit(0);' || echo 'Install postgres plugin first'
scripts.generate: [ -f drizzle.config.ts ] && drizzle-kit generate || echo 'Install postgres plugin first'
scripts.db:push: [ -f drizzle.config.ts ] && drizzle-kit push || echo 'Install postgres plugin first'
